task_description: Build voice input UI for chat screen using record package as fallback for Wispr Flow, and create backend POST /voice/transcribe endpoint using OpenAI Whisper API

verification.summary: All Python files pass py_compile. No Flutter SDK available but code follows project conventions (AnimatedBuilder pattern, Riverpod ConsumerStatefulWidget, Dio service layer). Backend files verified with python -m py_compile. All RULES.md constraints met.
